---
toc: false
page-layout: custom
sidebar: false
title: ""
subtitle: ""
description: ""
author: ""
date: ""
---

```{=html}
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;1,400&family=Source+Code+Pro:wght@400;600&display=swap');

  #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
  .banner, .banner * { box-sizing: border-box; }

  .banner {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
    position: relative;
    background: #f7f4ee;
    overflow: hidden;
    font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
  }

  /* ── Left column ── */
  .left-col {
    flex: 0 0 400px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 64px 48px 64px 64px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .left-col::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 5px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a3a5c 0%, #2a6aaa 60%, #c8922a 100%);
  }

  .eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #2a6aaa;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .banner-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 52px;
    line-height: 1.08;
    color: #1a2535;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .banner-title em {
    color: #c8922a;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .banner-subtitle {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #5a7a9a;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .divider {
    width: 48px;
    height: 2px;
    background: #c8922a;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .tags {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #1a3a5c;
    border: 1px solid #b0c4d8;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    background: #eef4fa;
  }

  .enter-button {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    align-self: flex-start;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #f7f4ee;
    text-decoration: none;
    background: #1a3a5c;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .enter-button:hover { background: #2a5a8c; color: #f7f4ee; }

  .credit {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 28px; left: 64px;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    color: #8a9aaa;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* ── Right column ── */
  .right-col {
    flex: 1;
    position: relative;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-left: 1px solid #dde5ee;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 40px 36px;
  }

  .right-col::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(#e4ecf4 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, #e4ecf4 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 28px 28px;
    opacity: 0.45;
  }

  .art-svg {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 520px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 860px) {
    .banner { flex-direction: column; }
    .left-col { flex: none; padding: 48px 32px; }
    .right-col { min-height: 460px; }
    .banner-title { font-size: 38px; }
  }
</style>

<div class="banner">

  <div class="left-col">
    <div class="eyebrow">Course Notes &nbsp;·&nbsp; ESCI 506</div>
    <div class="banner-title">Time <em>Series</em><br>Analysis</div>
    <div class="banner-subtitle">for Environmental Science</div>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="tags">
      <span class="tag">Decomposition</span>
      <span class="tag">ARMA</span>
      <span class="tag">Forecasting</span>
      <span class="tag">Cross-correlation</span>
      <span class="tag">Spectral</span>
      <span class="tag">Regression</span>
    </div>
    <a href="00Welcome.html" class="enter-button">Welcome &nbsp;→</a>
    <div class="credit">Andy Bunn</div>
  </div>

  <div class="right-col">
    <!--
      Three stacked panels drawn as clean ink-on-paper plots:
        1. Observed time series (seasonal + trend + noise)
        2. ACF — slow sinusoidal decay typical of a seasonal AR process
        3. PACF — sharp AR(2) cut-off, seasonal spike at lag 12
      Palette: ink-navy #1a3a5c, amber #c8922a, muted-blue #2a6aaa, brick-red #b04020
      y-scale per panel: zero line given, ±1 unit mapped to ±46px
    -->
    <svg class="art-svg" viewBox="0 0 520 555" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <defs>
        <marker id="ann" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5"
                markerWidth="5" markerHeight="5" orient="auto-start-reverse">
          <path d="M2 1L8 5L2 9" fill="none" stroke="#c8922a"
                stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </marker>
        <style>
          .ax  { stroke:#c0ccda; stroke-width:1; fill:none; }
          .zl  { stroke:#c0ccda; stroke-width:0.8; fill:none; stroke-dasharray:3 3; }
          .ci  { stroke:#c8922a; stroke-width:0.9; fill:none; stroke-dasharray:4 3; }
          .axl { font-family:'Source Code Pro',monospace; font-size:9px;
                 fill:#8a9aaa; letter-spacing:0.5px; }
          .lbl { font-family:'Source Code Pro',monospace; font-size:10px;
                 font-weight:600; fill:#1a2535; letter-spacing:2px; }
          .ann { font-family:'Source Code Pro',monospace; font-size:9px;
                 fill:#c8922a; letter-spacing:0.5px; }
          .sep { stroke:#dde5ee; stroke-width:1; stroke-dasharray:5 4; fill:none; }
        </style>
      </defs>

      <!-- ═══════════════════════════════
           PANEL 1 — TIME SERIES  y 0–178
      ═══════════════════════════════ -->
      <text class="lbl" x="30" y="16">Time series</text>

      <line class="ax" x1="30" y1="155" x2="510" y2="155"/>
      <line class="ax" x1="30" y1="22"  x2="30"  y2="155"/>
      <line class="zl" x1="30" y1="88"  x2="510" y2="88"/>

      <!-- y labels -->
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="26"  text-anchor="end">+2</text>
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="57"  text-anchor="end">+1</text>
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="91"  text-anchor="end"> 0</text>
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="124" text-anchor="end">−1</text>
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="155" text-anchor="end">−2</text>

      <!-- x labels — 1980–2000 at even intervals -->
      <text class="axl" x="30"  y="167" text-anchor="middle">1980</text>
      <text class="axl" x="150" y="167" text-anchor="middle">1985</text>
      <text class="axl" x="270" y="167" text-anchor="middle">1990</text>
      <text class="axl" x="390" y="167" text-anchor="middle">1995</text>
      <text class="axl" x="510" y="167" text-anchor="middle">2000</text>

      <!-- trend line (gentle upward, amber, behind signal) -->
      <line x1="30" y1="106" x2="510" y2="70"
            stroke="#e0b050" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.55" fill="none"/>

      <!-- main oscillating signal: seasonal + trend + noise -->
      <path fill="none" stroke="#1a3a5c" stroke-width="2.1"
            stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
            d="M 30 106
               C 44 80,  58 68,  72 82
               C 86 96,  100 116, 114 108
               C 128 100,142 76,  156 66
               C 170 56, 184 80,  198 94
               C 212 108,226 122, 240 114
               C 254 106,268 84,  282 74
               C 296 64, 310 82,  324 94
               C 338 106,352 120, 366 106
               C 380 92, 394 70,  408 62
               C 422 54, 436 76,  450 90
               C 464 104,478 116, 492 100
               L 510 90"/>

      <!-- noise dots -->
      <circle cx="44"  cy="84"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="72"  cy="78"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="120" r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="128" cy="96"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="156" cy="62"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="184" cy="84"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="212" cy="112" r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="240" cy="118" r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="268" cy="80"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="296" cy="60"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="324" cy="98"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="352" cy="116" r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="380" cy="88"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="408" cy="58"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="436" cy="78"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="464" cy="108" r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="492" cy="96"  r="2.2" fill="#1a3a5c" opacity="0.3"/>

      <!-- legend -->
      <line x1="340" y1="30" x2="368" y2="30" stroke="#1a3a5c" stroke-width="2.1"/>
      <text class="axl" x="373" y="34">observed</text>
      <line x1="340" y1="46" x2="368" y2="46" stroke="#e0b050" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.85"/>
      <text class="axl" x="373" y="50">trend</text>

      <!-- separator -->
      <line class="sep" x1="30" y1="185" x2="510" y2="185"/>

      <!-- ═══════════════════════════════
           PANEL 2 — ACF   y 193–343
           zero=268, +1=222, -1=314
           unit = 46px
      ═══════════════════════════════ -->
      <text class="lbl" x="30" y="203">ACF</text>

      <line class="ax" x1="30" y1="315" x2="510" y2="315"/>
      <line class="ax" x1="30" y1="208" x2="30"  y2="315"/>
      <line class="zl" x1="30" y1="262" x2="510" y2="262"/>

      <text class="axl" x="24" y="211" text-anchor="end">1.0</text>
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="264" text-anchor="end">0.0</text>
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="315" text-anchor="end">−1</text>

      <!-- lag labels 0–20 -->
      <text class="axl" x="34"  y="328" text-anchor="middle">0</text>
      <text class="axl" x="82"  y="328" text-anchor="middle">2</text>
      <text class="axl" x="130" y="328" text-anchor="middle">4</text>
      <text class="axl" x="178" y="328" text-anchor="middle">6</text>
      <text class="axl" x="226" y="328" text-anchor="middle">8</text>
      <text class="axl" x="274" y="328" text-anchor="middle">10</text>
      <text class="axl" x="322" y="328" text-anchor="middle">12</text>
      <text class="axl" x="370" y="328" text-anchor="middle">14</text>
      <text class="axl" x="418" y="328" text-anchor="middle">16</text>
      <text class="axl" x="466" y="328" text-anchor="middle">18</text>
      <text class="axl" x="510" y="328" text-anchor="middle">20</text>
      <text class="axl" x="270" y="340" text-anchor="middle">lag</text>

      <!-- CI bands (±1.96/√n ≈ 0.22 → 10px) -->
      <rect x="30" y="252" width="480" height="10" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.07"/>
      <line class="ci" x1="30" y1="252" x2="510" y2="252"/>
      <line class="ci" x1="30" y1="272" x2="510" y2="272"/>
      <text class="ann" x="513" y="256">+95%</text>
      <text class="ann" x="513" y="276">−95%</text>

      <!-- ACF bars (bar width 9, spacing 24, start x=30)
           lag k → x_center = 30 + k*24
           positive: fill navy; negative: fill brick-red
           heights: val * 46px, measured from zero line y=262
           lag  0: 1.00 → up 46 → y=216 h=46
           lag  1: 0.80 → up 37 → y=225 h=37
           lag  2: 0.54 → up 25 → y=237 h=25
           lag  3: 0.24 → up 11 → y=251 h=11
           lag  4: −0.06→ dn  3 → y=262 h=3
           lag  5: −0.36→ dn 17 → y=262 h=17
           lag  6: −0.60→ dn 28 → y=262 h=28
           lag  7: −0.72→ dn 33 → y=262 h=33
           lag  8: −0.58→ dn 27 → y=262 h=27
           lag  9: −0.28→ dn 13 → y=262 h=13
           lag 10: −0.02→ dn  1 → y=262 h=1
           lag 11:  0.30→ up 14 → y=248 h=14
           lag 12:  0.62→ up 29 → y=233 h=29
           lag 13:  0.52→ up 24 → y=238 h=24
           lag 14:  0.34→ up 16 → y=246 h=16
           lag 15:  0.10→ up  5 → y=257 h=5
           lag 16: −0.14→ dn  6 → y=262 h=6
           lag 17: −0.36→ dn 17 → y=262 h=17
           lag 18: −0.50→ dn 23 → y=262 h=23
           lag 19: −0.38→ dn 17 → y=262 h=17  -->
      <rect x="30"  y="216" width="9" height="46" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="54"  y="225" width="9" height="37" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="78"  y="237" width="9" height="25" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="102" y="251" width="9" height="11" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="126" y="262" width="9" height="3"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="150" y="262" width="9" height="17" fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="174" y="262" width="9" height="28" fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="198" y="262" width="9" height="33" fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="222" y="262" width="9" height="27" fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="246" y="262" width="9" height="13" fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="270" y="262" width="9" height="1"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="294" y="248" width="9" height="14" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="318" y="233" width="9" height="29" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="342" y="238" width="9" height="24" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="366" y="246" width="9" height="16" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="390" y="257" width="9" height="5"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="414" y="262" width="9" height="6"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="438" y="262" width="9" height="17" fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="462" y="262" width="9" height="23" fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="486" y="262" width="9" height="17" fill="#b04020"/>

      <!-- annotation: annual spike lag 12 -->
      <line x1="322" y1="228" x2="322" y2="210"
            stroke="#c8922a" stroke-width="1.1" marker-end="url(#ann)"/>
      <text class="ann" x="333" y="209">annual cycle (lag 12)</text>

      <!-- separator -->
      <line class="sep" x1="30" y1="352" x2="510" y2="352"/>

      <!-- ═══════════════════════════════
           PANEL 3 — PACF  y 360–515
           zero=438, +1=392, -1=484
           unit = 46px
      ═══════════════════════════════ -->
      <text class="lbl" x="30" y="370">PACF</text>

      <line class="ax" x1="30" y1="484" x2="510" y2="484"/>
      <line class="ax" x1="30" y1="375" x2="30"  y2="484"/>
      <line class="zl" x1="30" y1="430" x2="510" y2="430"/>

      <text class="axl" x="24" y="378" text-anchor="end">1.0</text>
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="432" text-anchor="end">0.0</text>
      <text class="axl" x="24" y="484" text-anchor="end">−1</text>

      <text class="axl" x="34"  y="497" text-anchor="middle">0</text>
      <text class="axl" x="82"  y="497" text-anchor="middle">2</text>
      <text class="axl" x="130" y="497" text-anchor="middle">4</text>
      <text class="axl" x="178" y="497" text-anchor="middle">6</text>
      <text class="axl" x="226" y="497" text-anchor="middle">8</text>
      <text class="axl" x="274" y="497" text-anchor="middle">10</text>
      <text class="axl" x="322" y="497" text-anchor="middle">12</text>
      <text class="axl" x="370" y="497" text-anchor="middle">14</text>
      <text class="axl" x="418" y="497" text-anchor="middle">16</text>
      <text class="axl" x="466" y="497" text-anchor="middle">18</text>
      <text class="axl" x="510" y="497" text-anchor="middle">20</text>
      <text class="axl" x="270" y="509" text-anchor="middle">lag</text>

      <!-- CI bands -->
      <rect x="30" y="420" width="480" height="10" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.07"/>
      <line class="ci" x1="30" y1="420" x2="510" y2="420"/>
      <line class="ci" x1="30" y1="440" x2="510" y2="440"/>
      <text class="ann" x="513" y="424">+95%</text>
      <text class="ann" x="513" y="444">−95%</text>

      <!-- PACF bars: AR(2) cut-off pattern
           lag  0: 1.00 → up 46 → y=384 h=46
           lag  1: 0.82 → up 38 → y=392 h=38
           lag  2: 0.36 → up 17 → y=413 h=17
           lag  3: 0.04 → up  2 → y=428 h=2
           lag  4: −0.05→ dn  2 → y=430 h=2
           lag  5: −0.08→ dn  4 → y=430 h=4
           lag  6: −0.06→ dn  3 → y=430 h=3
           lag  7: −0.04→ dn  2 → y=430 h=2
           lag  8:  0.03→ up  1 → y=429 h=1
           lag  9:  0.06→ up  3 → y=427 h=3
           lag 10:  0.02→ up  1 → y=429 h=1
           lag 11:  0.08→ up  4 → y=426 h=4
           lag 12:  0.36→ up 17 → y=413 h=17  (seasonal, colored differently)
           lag 13:  0.08→ up  4 → y=426 h=4
           lag 14: −0.06→ dn  3 → y=430 h=3
           lag 15: −0.04→ dn  2 → y=430 h=2
           lag 16:  0.02→ up  1 → y=429 h=1
           lag 17: −0.05→ dn  2 → y=430 h=2
           lag 18: −0.07→ dn  3 → y=430 h=3
           lag 19:  0.04→ up  2 → y=428 h=2  -->
      <rect x="30"  y="384" width="9" height="46" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="54"  y="392" width="9" height="38" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="78"  y="413" width="9" height="17" fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="102" y="428" width="9" height="2"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="126" y="430" width="9" height="2"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="150" y="430" width="9" height="4"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="174" y="430" width="9" height="3"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="198" y="430" width="9" height="2"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="222" y="429" width="9" height="1"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="246" y="427" width="9" height="3"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="270" y="429" width="9" height="1"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="294" y="426" width="9" height="4"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="318" y="413" width="9" height="17" fill="#2a6aaa"/>
      <rect x="342" y="426" width="9" height="4"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="366" y="430" width="9" height="3"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="390" y="430" width="9" height="2"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="414" y="429" width="9" height="1"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>
      <rect x="438" y="430" width="9" height="2"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="462" y="430" width="9" height="3"  fill="#b04020"/>
      <rect x="486" y="428" width="9" height="2"  fill="#1a3a5c"/>

      <!-- annotation: AR(2) signature -->
      <line x1="63"  y1="386" x2="96"  y2="368"
            stroke="#c8922a" stroke-width="1.1" marker-end="url(#ann)"/>
      <text class="ann" x="100" y="367">AR(2) signature</text>

      <!-- annotation: seasonal spike lag 12 PACF -->
      <line x1="322" y1="408" x2="355" y2="394"
            stroke="#2a6aaa" stroke-width="1.1" marker-end="url(#ann)"/>

    </svg>
  </div>

</div>
```
